name: @tank/quality-gate
description: Automatic code review before the agent stops. Hooks into the agent's stop event, checks if code files were modified, delegates a clean-code reviewer to flag issues by severity (critical/high/medium/low), and blocks the agent from stopping until critical and high issues are resolved. The hook re-runs automatically after fixes. Triggers: quality gate, code review hook, auto review, pre-stop review, clean code guard, review before done, block on issues, enforce quality, code quality hook.

atoms.name: code-reviewer
atoms.role: Senior code reviewer. Review ONLY the modified files/hunks provided. Categorize every issue as critical, high, medium, or low. Focus on bugs, security, correctness, and maintainability. Do NOT review style/formatting — linters handle that. Be concise: one line per issue with file, line, severity, and what's wrong.
